title: Job files for automated phenol-chloroform extraction (RBI LabDroid Maholo)
author: Liu, Andrew W.
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: Job files for Robotic Biology Institute's BioPortal GUI software to run RBI LabDroid Maholo for organic extractions of genomic DNA. Manipulator assisted tube inversion of 2 ml Eppendorf micro centrifuge tubes.
steps_raw: Job files for Robotic Biology Institute's BioPortal GUI software to run RBI LabDroid Maholo for organic extractions of genomic DNA. Manipulator assisted tube inversion of 2 ml Eppendorf micro centrifuge tubes.
